g.text: Tagline: 5-7 words describing what you d
Problem: $X billion lost annually to Y
Current solutions are slow, expensive, and unreliable
Our solution eliminates Y with AI-powered Z
Key features: 10x faster processing, 60% cost reduction, real-time analytics
We outperform incumbents on every key metric
Competitor A: Batch processing, legacy stack
Competitor B: Manual, high cost, slow
SaaS model with 85% gross margins at scale
Pricing: $99/mo starter, $499/mo pro, enterprise custom. LTV/CAC: 5.2x
CEO: 15 years industry, prev. VP at BigCo
CTO: Ex-Google, built systems at scale
COO: Operations expert, grew prev. startup 10x
Raising $3M Series A to accelerate growth
Use of funds: 50% Engineering (AI/ML team), 30% Sales & Marketing, 20%
